subject: affs: fix a memory leak in affs_remount
notes: Stage1 features.json + Stage2 seed.c reused from earlier aborted attempt (deterministic from inputs).

Initial POC (multi-variant with main()) failed verifier-v1 with 3 mismatches; regenerated lean single-buggy-function POC mirroring seed structure -> OK row F1.acq=0 F1.rel=2 F3.goto=0 F5.ret=4 F2.if=4.
POC locked at chmod 444, sha recorded.

Plan revised: hasMatchingRelease (flow-insensitive) was insufficient because affs_remount has kfree(new_opts) on the error path; switched to hasLeakingReturn (CFG reachability: ReturnStmt reachable from acquire with no intervening kfree on path).

final.ql compiled clean on first attempt; poc-db run fires exactly one row at the kstrdup call on line 46 inside affs_remount_buggy. Oracle: buggy_fires=true, fixed_fires=false (no fixed in POC), fp_fires=false.
